expectations.text: The log-session-summary skill is invoked during this run
expectations.evidence: The transcript explicitly states 'INVOKED — host parsed the prompt as a slash command and directly loaded the skill instructions' under the '## Skill invocation' section. The transcript notes confirm the slash command format '/project-continuity:log-session-summary' was correctly parsed by the host.

expectations.text: SESSION_LOG.md exists at the working directory root after the run
expectations.evidence: SESSION_LOG.md is present in the outputs directory alongside transcript.md and metrics.json. The transcript also lists it under '## Files created': 'SESSION_LOG.md — appended one session entry to the working directory root'.

expectations.text: SESSION_LOG.md contains all five required sections (Date/time, Tasks completed, Files modified, Decisions made, Open questions) -- empty sections may be marked 'None' but must be present
expectations.evidence: SESSION_LOG.md contains all five required sections: '**Date/time**: 2026-05-01T00:00:00Z', '**Tasks completed**: None...', '**Files modified**: None...', '**Decisions made**: None...', '**Open questions**: None...'. Empty sections are explicitly marked 'None' rather than omitted.
